mapper.select: SELECT task_classification_id AS taskClassificationId , work_name AS workName , using_yn AS usingYn FROM work_classification WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND using_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY order_no
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(project_time_id), 0) + 1 FROM project_time_classification
INSERT INTO project_time_classification (project_time_id, project_id, task_classification_id) VALUES (#{projectTimeId}, #{projectId}, #{taskClassificationId})
